    name: mongodb-replica
    namespace: mongodb

    uid: 41f3d0fd-a516-4210-8e8e-61a566101223
  spec:
    persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
      whenDeleted: Retain
      whenScaled: Retain
    podManagementPolicy: Parallel
    replicas: 3
    revisionHistoryLimit: 10
    selector:

        app: mongodb-replica

    template:
      metadata:
        creationTimestamp: null
        labels:

      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - mongod
          - --replSet
          - mongodb-replica
          - --bind_ip_all

          - --keyFile=/etc/mongo-keyfile/keyfile

          - name: POD_NAME
            valueFrom:
              fieldRef:
                apiVersion: v1
                fieldPath: metadata.name
          image: mongo:6.0.5
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
              - /usr/local/bin/health-check.sh
            failureThreshold: 10
            initialDelaySeconds: 90
            periodSeconds: 10
            successThreshold: 1
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          name: mongod

          - containerPort: 27017

            protocol: TCP

            initialDelaySeconds: 60
            periodSeconds: 10
            successThreshold: 1
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          resources:
            limits:
              cpu: "1"
              memory: 1Gi
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
          volumeMounts:
          - mountPath: /data/db
            name: data-volume
          - mountPath: /etc/mongo-keyfile
            name: mongo-keyfile
            readOnly: true

            readOnly: true

            name: health-secret
            readOnly: true
          - mountPath: /etc/health/overrides
            name: health-overrides
            readOnly: true
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: Always
        schedulerName: default-scheduler
        securityContext:
          runAsGroup: 0

content.thinking: Authentication is failing. Let me check the health-check script and look at how authentication works in this setup.

input.command: kubectl get configmap -n mongodb health-check-script -o yaml 2>&1
kubectl get secret -n mongodb health-user-password -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  health-check.sh: |
    #!/bin/sh
    set -e
    PW_FILE="/etc/health/health-password"
    OVERRIDE="/etc/health/overrides/${POD_NAME}"
    if [ -f "$OVERRIDE" ]; then
      HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$OVERRIDE")"
    else
      HEALTH_PW="$(cat "$PW_FILE")"
    fi
    mongosh --quiet "mongodb://health-user:${HEALTH_PW}@localhost:27017/admin" --eval 'db.hello().ok' >/dev/null
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"v1","data":{"health-check.sh":"#!/bin/sh\nset -e\nPW_FILE=\"/etc/health/health-password\"\nOVERRIDE=\"/etc/health/overrides/${POD_NAME}\"\nif [ -f \"$OVERRIDE\" ]; then\n  HEALTH_PW=\"$(cat \"$OVERRIDE\")\"\nelse\n  HEALTH_PW=\"$(cat \"$PW_FILE\")\"\nfi\nmongosh --quiet \"mongodb://health-user:${HEALTH_PW}@localhost:27017/admin\" --eval 'db.hello().ok' \u003e/dev/null\n"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"health-check-script","namespace":"mongodb"}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T15:57:44Z"
  name: health-check-script
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "1164192"
  uid: 1a4eabe7-30df-4ed1-9251-663d938ff97d

The replica set is actually healthy: 1 PRIMARY (mongodb-replica-0) and 2 SECONDARYs (mongodb-replica-1 and mongodb-replica-2). The pods also show as Ready (1/1). 

But the task says:

- "monitoring cannot see them" - the monitoring label needs to be `enabled`

content.thinking:
The pod template only has `app=mongodb-replica` label. I need to add `monitoring=enabled` to the pod template labels. This will trigger a rolling update of the StatefulSet, which will restart the pods with the new label.

Let me patch the StatefulSet to add the monitoring label to the pod template.

content.text: The pod template is missing the `monitoring=enabled` label. I'll patch the StatefulSet to add it, which will trigger a rolling update.
